Hatfield is a smooth-talking cardsharp who claims to be along to "protect" Lucy, although he seems to have romantic intentions. Dr. Boone is a self-styled philosopher, drunkard and physician who's been stripped of his license. Mr. Peacock is a nervous whiskey salesman. Gatewood is a crooked banker who needs to get out of town. Buck is the hayseed stage driver, and Sheriff Wilcox is along to offer protection and keep an eye peeled for the Ringo Kid, a well-known outlaw who has just broken out of jail. While Wilcox does find Ringo, a principled man who gives himself up without a fight, the real danger lies farther down the trail, where a band of Apaches, led by Geronimo, could attack at any time.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour
programme.desc: Welcome to The Fly Shop Tour! In September of 2022, we set across the Rocky Mountains on a 2500 Mile Road Trip visiting & fishing with local Fly Shops. Our Mission? To highlight small businesses that drive the sport we love: Fly Fishing! Along the way, we got a chance to host meetups in every state - all with the goal to raise money for local conservation organizations & meet some of our fans. Follow us as we tell the story of 12 unique fly shops, fish the waters surrounding their area, and make our way throughout the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Fly Shop Tour

The team also participates in a special event at Roadhouse Brewing Co., raising money for Jackson Hole Trout Unlimited to help conserve and protect local trout populations.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 226: Worlds Are Next: Final Rankings & Stevie Award Predictions With the ACL World Championships just around the corner, this week on Around The ACL, Jake, Meesh, and Anthony break down the final Singles rankings and discuss who has positioned themselves as the player to beat heading into the biggest event of the season. From Logan Chamberlain and Colin Hodet to Mark Richards, Zack Aiken, and Gabriel Clauson, the crew debates who has the momentum and who still has something to prove. The show also takes a look at the Pro Invitational teams and what fans should be watching as the sport's top players prepare to battle for a World Championship. To close out the episode, the hosts cast their ballots for the Around The ACL Stevie Awards. They debate the fan-nominated finalists for Game of the Year, Shot of the Year, Breakout Player, Rookie of the Year, and MVP while revisiting some of the biggest moments and performances from an unforgettable ACL season. Join us as we celebrate the season that was and look ahead to the biggest week in cornhole.

programme.title: Hogslayer
programme.desc: The award-winning true-life story of the dual-engine Norton motorcycle dragster designed, built, and raced by TC Christenson and John Gregory of Sunset Motors. The documentary chronicles the Sunset Motors Racing Team’s unrivaled innovation and unbridled courage as they faced unyielding challengers throughout the United States and Europe in the 1970’s. TC and John are featured as they relate their experiences of those years rising from local street racers to the top race team in the world. This is bench-racing at its best directly from the original Sunset Motors in Kenosha, Wisconsin, home of the Hogslayer.

programme.desc: When Johnny Travers (Jay Kirby) is falsely accused of robbing a bank, it's up to Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) to clear his name and find the real villains. There's nothing better than watching Hoppy get rough with the rustlers, and it's all the bett...

programme.desc: Tim McCoy, one of the unsung heroes of 1930s western pictures, stars in a dual role. First, hes Slim Braddock, a miner who turns to robbing stagecoaches after being swindled by a banker. When Slim is murdered, his son Tim, also played by McCoy, seeks v...

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E23 The Alexander Portlass Story

programme.title: Wagon Train S2E21 The Annie Griffith Story

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 7 Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: The Wagon Train S2E16 The Hunter Malloy Story
programme.desc: After Hunter Malloy kills a man in self-defense, he flees to the wagon train to escape a vengeful sheriff. As the lawman closes in, Malloy must decide whether to continue running or stand his ground and face the consequences of his actions.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 11 The Trail Gang
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright hires a young drifter named "Sam Jackson" to work as a drover on a cattle drive. Unbeknownst to the Cartwrights, Jackson is actually an outlaw named Johnny Logan. Logan joined the drive specifically because he knew the route would pass near the town of Waycross, where he intends to kill the local sheriff—who is, in fact, his own father

programme.title: Arizona
programme.desc: Perrin is a cowboy who comes to the aid of local Indians being swindled out of their gold. He signs on as a ranch foreman, but learns the ranch is the home of the crooks.

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Watchmaker
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks 1961
programme.desc: Marlon Brando directs and stars in One-Eyed Jacks, a gripping Western of betrayal and revenge. As outlaw Rio (Brando) breaks free from prison, he sets his sights on settling the score with his former partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), who double-crossed him years before and now wears the badge of a sheriff. But Rio’s quest for vengeance grows complicated when he falls for Longworth’s spirited daughter, leaving him torn between love and justice. Sweeping vistas, raw emotion, and Brando’s electrifying presence make this a Western unlike any other.
